Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase | YES | HIGH confidence**

The network is witnessing explosive growth as the **Pectra Upgrade enters its final testing phase**, promising to revolutionize wallet abstraction and validator efficiency.[2] Layer 2 ecosystems like Base and Arbitrum are surpassing major TVL milestones.[2]
